segments.original_text: 被ダメージは抑えたいところ

segments.text: Against that two-hit forward smash, shield accidentally dropped on the second hit
segments.original_text: 2段の横スマッシュに対して思わず2段目でガードが離れてしまっていました

full_text: Gotta minimize the damage there. Against that two-hit forward smash, shield accidentally dropped on the second hit. Hmm, that's incredibly well done
